decision.supersede_reason: The 2026-07-22 terms-of-use review found the TWSE website 使用條款 prohibits automated/scripted downloads without TWSE consent; the user abandoned option C and selected option B.

trial_capture.approval_note: 2026-07-22 user selection of option B; exactly 1 bounded GET, same pattern as the 2308 trial capture
trial_capture.provider_calls_note: Human-approved bounded trial GET only; provider_calls_made_by_repository remains 0 (activation counter).
trial_capture.latest_day_semantics: All 1371 rows share exactly one Date value (1150722 = 2026-07-22, the most recent completed session at fetch time). Confirmed: single-latest-trading-day snapshot; history accumulates from daily captures only.

license_analysis.conclusion: STOCK_DAY_ALL is the endpoint behind data.gov.tw dataset 11549, published under 政府資料開放授權條款-第1版: free, non-exclusive, irrevocable use including derivatives, with mandatory attribution. The TWSE 使用條款 automated-download clause expressly exempts data licensed through 政府資料開放平臺, so the option C conflict does not apply to this open-licensed channel. One human-initiated GET per trading day matches the dataset's daily-update design.
obligations: attribution 資料來源：臺灣證券交易所
license_analysis.residual_caveat: The license covers each captured daily snapshot, not a retrospective bulk pull; forward accumulation stays inside the licensed scope.

revisions.changes: status source_contract_blocked -> source_contract_selected_pending_activation; decision.user_selection_option_b added (supersedes option C, ToS gate resolved_by_abandoning_option_c); selected_strategy/selected_source set; option_b_forward_accumulation block with license analysis and trial capture; option C assessment marked superseded.

history_window three_calendar_years 2023-07-20..2026-07-19 -> forward_accumulation_from_activation (backfill none, backfill_policy wait_for_free_bulk); status -> pending_work_unit_digest_approval; preparation_status -> active_work_unit_preparation; current_preparation_step -> p5_3_exact_human_run_work_unit_digest; request budget, scope, required_decisions, execution_order reworded to daily-snapshot shape; option C budget amendment marked superseded.
2026-07-22 revision note added; target and acceptance checklist revised from three-year retrospective to forward accumulation with accumulation target.

New work-unit draft: 1 human-initiated GET per trading day, calendar binding with rollover rule, raw retention (outputs/, sha256, attribution), normalized accumulation flow, fail-closed rules; status draft_not_runnable.

twse_source_contract_is_fail_closed now accepts source_contract_selected_pending_activation with invariants (provider_calls_made_by_repository == 0; selected_source null or activation pending_work_unit_digest_approval); pending_gates reduced to p5_3_exact_human_run_work_unit_digest when the workflow status is pending_work_unit_digest_approval.

DRAFT_PATH switched from the superseded tqe-p5-twse-work-unit.draft.json to the forward-accumulation draft; check renamed source_contract_is_blocked -> source_contract_is_fail_closed with the same dual-status invariant; output status blocked_source_contract -> blocked_pending_work_unit_digest_approval.

Assertions updated: preflight status pending_human_gate, preparation step p5_3_exact_human_run_work_unit_digest, single pending gate; candidate test replaced by option-B selection assertions (source selected, not activated, decision recorded).
Status assertion updated to blocked_pending_work_unit_digest_approval; fail-closed check key asserted.

status_change_justification: Keeping source_contract_blocked would misrepresent the decision record: the user has selected a source under option B, so the blocker is no longer the absence of a free source but the unapproved work-unit digest. The fail-closed semantics are preserved in both scripts: activation still requires provider_calls_made_by_repository == 0 and selected_source.activation == pending_work_unit_digest_approval, and execution_ready stays false.
acceptance_notes: No activation occurred: the only network call was the 1-GET bounded trial capture of STOCK_DAY_ALL; provider_calls_made_by_repository remains 0.
Option C artifacts (work-unit draft, session list, retention policy, trial captures) are retained as superseded records and must not be activated without a new explicit user decision.
The three-year retrospective goal is deferred, not abandoned: backfill may resume if a free official bounded bulk source appears, via a separate P5.1 pass.
Each new calendar year requires a fresh official calendar capture with separate user approval (calendar rollover rule in the work-unit draft).
next_human_approval_point: Approve the exact forward-accumulation work-unit digest (set the activation date, then approve the recomputed sha256) before any host egress.
